Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Provides notice regarding the timeliness of the receipt by the board of elections of ballots capable of return by mail
Summary: Provides notice regarding the timeliness of the receipt by the board of elections of ballots capable of return by mail to advise voters that such ballot should be returned to the board of elections as soon as possible by any approved method, and further recommend the use of alternative methods of return besides domestic mail services if the voter will be returning their ballot within several days of the election.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the election law, in relation to providing notice regarding the timeliness of the receipt by the board of elections of ballots capable of return by mail
